api_id.description: API ID to rotate (relevant only for rotator-type=api-key)

application_id.description: Id of the azure app that hold the serect to be rotated (relevant only for rotator-type=api-key & authentication-credentials=use-target-creds)

authentication_credentials.description: Credentials to connect with: use-user-creds or use-target-creds

auto_rotate.description: Whether to automatically rotate every rotation-interval days [true/false]

explicitly_set_sa.description: If set, explicitly provide the storage account details [true/false]

grace_rotation.description: Enable graceful rotation (keep both versions temporarily). When enabled, a new secret version is created while the previous version is kept for the grace period, so both versions exist for a limited time. [true/false]

grace_rotation_hour.description: The Hour of the grace rotation in UTC

grace_rotation_interval.description: The number of days to wait before deleting the old key (must be bigger than rotation-interval)

grace_rotation_timing.description: When to create the new version relative to the rotation date [after/before]

key.description: Encryption key name for the secret value

password_length.description: Length of the password to be generated

resource_group_name.description: The resource group name (only relevant when explicitly-set-sa=true)

resource_name.description: The name of the storage account (only relevant when explicitly-set-sa=true)

rotation_event_in.description: How many days before the rotation of the item would you like to be notified

rotation_hour.description: The hour of the rotation in UTC

rotation_interval.description: Days between every automatic key rotation (1-365)

rotator_type.description: The rotator type: target or api-key

storage_account_key_name.description: The name of the storage account key to rotate [key1/key2/kerb1/kerb2] (relevat to azure-storage-account)

api_key.description: API key to rotate (relevant only for rotator-type=api-key)
